spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates scaling padding, border-width, and icon dimensions alongside text using calc() with the environment variable.

interactive.rationale: Includes an interactive slider that multiplies the scale in real time, showing proportional differences immediately.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Perfectly aligns with the blurb about solving the follow-on accessibility issue of text-only zoom.

edge_cases.rationale: Provides a valuable side-by-side comparison of the anti-pattern (text-only zoom) vs the target pattern (proportional zoom).

references.rationale: Includes reference links to the ChromeStatus feature and parent index page.

design_system.rationale: Leverages design system colors, spaces, fonts, and shadow variables correctly.

summary: This concept highlights a critical UX and accessibility topic, proving the benefit of env(preferred-text-scale) over text-only zoom by visually contrasting a cramped anti-pattern layout with a scaled, compliant layout.
